title: Writing Practice: Hiragana & Japanese Introduction
description: Practice writing Hiragana characters and introduce yourself in Japanese.

blocks.title: Translate English to Japanese
blocks.instruction: Write these sentences in Japanese (romaji or hiragana):

items.answer: わたしのなまえは___です。(Watashi no namae wa ___ desu.)
ありがとうございます。(Arigatou gozaimasu.)
はい、わかりました。(Hai, wakarimashita.)

blocks.prompt:
Write a self-introduction in Japanese (romaji is fine!). Include:
1. Your name (わたしのなまえは...です)
2. Where you are from
3. Why you are learning Japanese
4. Something you like
5. End with よろしくおねがいします
blocks.sampleAnswer:
はじめまして！わたしのなまえはAlex(あれくす)です。アメリカからきました。にほんごをべんきょうしています。アニメがすきです。よろしくおねがいします！

(Hajimemashite! Watashi no namae wa Alex desu. Amerika kara kimashita. Nihongo wo benkyou shite imasu. Anime ga suki desu. Yoroshiku onegai shimasu!)

Translation: Nice to meet you! My name is Alex. I'm from America. I'm studying Japanese. I like anime. Please treat me kindly!
